stemHtml: In accordance with ICAO Doc 8168 after an aircraft receives a Traffic Advisory (TA), a Resolution Advisory (RA) may follow since...

options.a: A threatening aircraft must first cause a RA before an TA can be generated.
options.b: TAs propose vertical manoeuvres that are predicted to increase or maintain separation from threatening aircraft.
options.c: TAs indicate the approximate positions of intruding aircraft that may later cause RAs.
options.d: TAs propose horizontal manoeuvres that are predicted to increase or maintain separation from threatening aircraft.
